title: Muir Woods Visitor Center, 1 Muir Woods Rd, Mill Valley, CA 94941, US - MapQuest
content: # Muir Woods Visitor Center. The Muir Woods Visitor Center, located in Mill Valley, California, offers a range of informative resources and a gift shop dedicated to the iconic redwood forest. This center serves as a gateway to exploring Muir Woods National Monument, known for its towering ancient trees and scenic trails. It provides essential information for navigating the park and understanding its ecological significance. Nice to have a coffee at the cafe and spend time in the solitude on the deck. The lady in the visitor center got us quickly checked in and we were free to explore the grounds. Muir Woods is a national monument park. The park is nice because the weather... title: San Francisco Muir Woods Tour
content: # San Francisco Muir Woods Tour. Hop on to take a scenic drive across the Golden Gate Bridge, and adventure into Muir Woods National Forest. The Muir Woods Tours depart from the Big Bus Tours Visitor Center at 99 Jefferson Street in Fisherman’s Wharf San Francisco/ Big Bus Tours Stop 1. You will get 1.5 inside of the Muir Woods National Monument to explore at your own leisure. On your way back to San Francisco you will experience a scenic drive through the beautiful town of Sausalito with breath-taking views back on to the San Francisco skyline. Please note that you will need to choose your Muir Woods visit date and time at purchase. Please select the date you wish to go on the Muir Woods Tour at checkout. Enjoy sweeping views of the San Francisco Skyline and the Pacific Coast as you cross the Golden Gate and return to Fisherman's Wharf. * San Francisco Alcatraz & Muir Woods Tour.
